options.name: -eco_object_dir
options.description: specifies the directory in which various partition sub-directories are present.Each of these partition sub-directories must contain its eco_logical.txt, eco_physical.def.gz and, optionally, eco_net.def.gz and eco_pin.txt files

options.name: -post_eco_dir
options.description: specifies the post eco directory in which partition sub-directories - after eco is applied on each partition - will be saved

options.name: -pre_eco_dir
options.description: specifies the directory in which various partition sub-directories - corresponding the new version of the original design - are present. Eco objects will be applied to these partitions

options.name: -ptns
options.description: specifies the list of partition names to apply eco
